channel.title: Home Loan on Sakthi Priyan H
channel.description: Recent content in Home Loan on Sakthi Priyan H

item.title: ₹1 Crore Home Loan — The Reality
item.description: What a ₹1 Crore home loan at 8% truly costs — the gap between nominal fear and real burden across 10, 15, and 20 year tenures.

item.title: RealValue EMI Engine Use Cases
item.description: Discover real-world scenarios showing how to use the RealValue EMI Engine for home loans, car loans, personal loans, and understanding the true cost of debt with inflation-adjusted calculations.
